ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the customer */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's segment */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal of the order (before taxes and shipping) */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount of the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost of the order */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order (including taxes and shipping) */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order's status */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES order_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product's category */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product's supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the product (quantity x unit price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "ship_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping mode */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping carrier */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES shipping_carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_ship_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_mode_id") REFERENCES shipping_modes ("ship_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date the sales data was recorded */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the product */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit generated by the product */,
  "margin" REAL /* Margin of the product (profit / revenue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_modes" (
  "ship_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping mode */,
  "ship_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping mode */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time of the shipping mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carrier */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Name of the carrier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the carrier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the carrier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)
